published_prior_art.cite: RosenbaumKrieger1990 supplies the ordered hidden-covariate calculation; ZhangSmallHeng2024 supplies a nearby exactness/hardness boundary, but neither states this opposite-tail union witness.

repo_prior_art.cite: stat_rosenbaum_lf_family_minimax — banked Gamma=1 equality regression fixture

published_prior_art.cite: Rosenbaum1987SensitivityPermutation — Gamma=1 yields uniform assignment; reversal equality is an elementary symmetry specialization.

repo_prior_art.cite: stat_rosenbaum_lf_family_minimax — banked d-dagger gain 19/120 regression fixture

published_prior_art.cite: none — checked comparators do not state this signed opposite-tail matched-set fixture.

repo_prior_art.cite: stat_rosenbaum_lf_family_minimax explicitly reserves the practical exact joint-calibration and strictness-cell problem.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 2 (thm:gamma-one-equality)
novelty_flags.one_line: The Gamma=1 equality is already banked in stat_rosenbaum_lf_family_minimax and can only be retained as a credited sanity/regression result.

novelty_flags.label: Proposition 1 (prop:gamma-two-gap-witness)
novelty_flags.one_line: The d-dagger gain 19/120 is already banked in stat_rosenbaum_lf_family_minimax and is not new kernel novelty.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1 (thm:opposite-tail-capability-separation-and-hardness)
soundness_flags.one_line: The theorem is stated under ass:rational-computational-input but its first clause quantifies every real gamma>1; split the real-gamma algebraic clause from the rational encoded-input hardness scope.

soundness_flags.label: Open-ended Question 1 and tldr/project_justification
soundness_flags.one_line: The sole JPC statement asks whether the implementation and cell certificate exist, while the prose asserts that it terminates, returns an attaining law, and determines cells; make those claims conditional or promote a precisely stated construction to a conjecture.

soundness_flags.label: Open-ended Question 1 (oeq:operational-joint-certificate)
soundness_flags.one_line: “Without enumerating the full product family” and the requested rational “cells” lack a specified computational model and parameter space; define permitted implicit traversal and the fixed-design variables over which a finite cell partition is required.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Open-ended Question 1 / Fisher-sharp-null model
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Calibration is conditional on the Fisher sharp null and the conditional Rosenbaum product-law class, not weak-null or heterogeneous-effect validity.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Exact shared-law two-tail calibration UNDER the Fisher-sharp-null Rosenbaum product-law model.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Open-ended Question 1 / computational domain
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Any exact termination and verification claim is limited to finitely encoded rational scores, alpha, and Gamma, with no polynomial-time guarantee.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Finite exact-rational certification ON the stated encoded-input domain, potentially with exponential runtime.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Specify the OEQ's computation model: whether branch-and-price may visit all branches, what it may not materialize, and for each fixed design which rational parameters define its output cells.
Rewrite the tldr and fill paragraph conditionally until JPC is proved, or state a concrete JPC conjecture with its exact input-output certificate predicate.

Add a direct theorem-level comparison to ChiuKang2025Contingency explaining why its exact permutation-invariant contingency-table algorithm cannot evaluate the heterogeneous matched-set product-law signed-union functional.

recommended_next_step: Revise the internal scope/prose mismatch and make the operational certificate target computationally well-defined, then re-run novelty review.
